about: Application Engineer with hands-on expertise in SolidWorks, SolidCAM, and DraftSight. Passionate about bridging the gap between digital design and physical manufacturing—from generating precision CAD models and CAM toolpaths to automating drafting workflows with AutoLISP scripts and validating G-code for CNC machines.

experience.company: SKS Scan tech Engg. Exim Pvt. Ltd.
experience.description: Handle technical support, training, and workflow issues for SolidWorks, SolidCAM and DraftSight. Create and refine CAD models, CAM toolpaths, and CNC post processors. Build AutoLISP scripts to automate drafting tasks. Solve software–machine integration issues and validate G-code. Prepare training material, demos, and technical documentation.

Reviewed and interpreted engineering drawings and CAD models before part production. Modified CAD models to improve manufacturability and machining feasibility. Worked on basic program edits (G-code). Adjusted tool offsets, zero setting, and dimensional checks. Collaborated across multiple sectors.

education.description: Gained expertise in mechanical design, production processes, and problem-solving skills.
Strong academic performance with foundational skills in critical thinking and communication.

projects.title: CNC Post Processor Development
projects.description: Developed and refined custom CNC post processors to translate SolidCAM toolpaths into machine-specific G-code. Ensured compatibility across multiple CNC machine configurations at client sites.

projects.title: AutoLISP Drafting Automation Suite
projects.description: Built a suite of AutoLISP scripts to automate repetitive drafting tasks in DraftSight—including auto-dimensioning, layer management, and title block population—reducing manual effort by over 60%.

projects.title: CAM Toolpath Optimization
projects.description: Optimized multi-axis CAM toolpaths for complex parts, reducing machining time while maintaining tight tolerances. Included tool selection strategy and feed/speed parameter tuning.

projects.title: SolidWorks Training Program
projects.description: Designed and delivered structured training programs for engineering clients covering SolidWorks 3D modelling, assembly, drawing, and SolidCAM fundamentals. Produced comprehensive training documentation.

projects.title: Manufacturability CAD Model Rework
projects.description: Reviewed and modified production CAD models to improve manufacturability and reduce machining complexity, collaborating directly with the production floor team at Rico Auto Industries.

projects.title: Software–Machine Integration Troubleshooting
projects.description: Diagnosed and resolved integration issues between CAM software and CNC machines at multiple client sites, including tool path errors, controller compatibility issues, and G-code syntax corrections.
